name: Cron AI-2 — Weekly Trend Report (Mon 7AM EAT)

parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={ "model": "llama-3.1-sonar-large-128k-online", "messages": [{ "role": "system", "content": "You are a market research analyst for PrintHub Africa, a Nairobi printing company. Research current trends relevant to their business." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Research and report on: 1. Top trending 3D printable models this week on Printables and Thingiverse. 2. Trending topics in Kenya relevant to banner/signage printing (elections, sports, events, holidays). 3. What Nairobi businesses are currently ordering (trade shows, conferences, events this month). 4. Competitor activity in Nairobi print shops. 5. Recommended products to promote this week. Return a structured report with sources." }], "max_tokens": 2000, "return_citations": true, "search_recency_filter": "week" }

={ "model": "llama-3.1-sonar-large-128k-online", "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "What content formats and topics are trending this week on TikTok, Instagram and LinkedIn in Kenya and East Africa? What hashtags are trending? What should a Nairobi business be posting about right now?" }], "max_tokens": 1000, "return_citations": true, "search_recency_filter": "week" }

={ "contents": [{ "parts": [{ "text": "You are the marketing strategist for PrintHub Africa, a Nairobi printing company.

Market research from Perplexity:
{{ $node['Perplexity: Kenya Market Trends'].json.choices[0].message.content }}

Social media trends:
{{ $node['Perplexity: Social Media Trends'].json.choices[0].message.content }}

Our product catalogue:
{{ JSON.stringify($node['Fetch Product Catalogue'].json.products) }}

Create a weekly content and promotion strategy:
1. Top 3 products to promote this week and why
2. Content angles for each platform
3. Hashtags to use this week
4. Time-sensitive opportunities
5. Recommended ad spend focus

Return as JSON: { 'summary': 'text', 'topProducts': [], 'hashtags': [], 'opportunities': [], 'adFocus': 'text' }" }] }], "generationConfig": { "maxOutputTokens": 2000 } }
={{ JSON.stringify({ weekStarting: new Date().toISOString(), strategy: $json.strategy, contentCalendar: $json.calendar }) }}

={ "from": "PrintHub AI ", "to": "{{$env.ADMIN_EMAIL}}", "subject": "PrintHub Weekly Content Strategy — w/c {{ new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB') }}", "html": "

Weekly Marketing Strategy 🚀

Market Insights

{{ $node['Perplexity: Kenya Market Trends'].json.choices[0].message.content.slice(0, 500) }}...

Strategy Summary

{{ $node['Parse Strategy'].json.strategy.summary }}

Top Products to Push This Week

    {{ ($node['Parse Strategy'].json.strategy.topProducts || []).map(p => '
  • ' + p + '
    • ').join('') }}

Trending Hashtags

{{ ($node['Parse Strategy'].json.strategy.hashtags || []).join(' ') }}

View full content calendar →

" }
